title: Your campaigns - Emily Thornberry
text_excerpt: Your campaigns - Emily Thornberry Skip to main content Emily Thornberry For Islington South and Finsbury Join Get Involved Donate About Emily Newsletter Your campaigns Foreign Policy Home Affairs Finance & Economy Nature & Environment Islington South and Finsbury Visits Events Councillors Contact Help with the cost of living Careers More Menu Your campaigns Thank you to everyone who takes the time to write to me with your views and campaigns. I really enjoy reading your emails and endeavour to respond to everyone who emails me. If you’ve written to me about a policy issue, I receive thousands of mass campaign emails each week and I am therefore unable to respond to these directly. You can check out my views on current issues on this page. If your concerns are not fully addressed, please do get in touch directly with your thoughts.
